Pregnancy GI Support
GINGER+ Ondansetron & GINGER+ Famotidine · Rx-only · physician reviewed

GINGER+ Ondansetron and GINGER+ Famotidine contain FDA-approved active ingredients that are commonly used by physicians to support GI symptoms during pregnancy. All prescriptions are issued only after a physician consultation to determine if they are appropriate for you. Individual medical needs vary and our physicians will evaluate your specific situation before prescribing.
